title: lepidium lyratogynum
intro: Lepidium lyratogynum, also known as Chinese pepperwort or cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Lepidium lyratogynum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
